Agent.Name: Apprise

Variable.Help: One or more Apprise URLs separated by spaces, commas, semicolons, or new lines. Example: discord://WEBHOOK_ID/WEBHOOK_TOKEN
Optional Apprise tags used to filter configured URLs. Separate multiple tags with commas or spaces. Specify 'none' to send to every configured URL.
Specify the fields which are included in the title of the notification.
Specify the fields which are included in the message body of the notification.

Agent.Script:
#!/bin/bash ############ {0} ############
SCRIPTNAME=$(basename "$0") LOG="/var/log/notify_${SCRIPTNAME%.*}"
if ! command -v apprise >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "apprise command not found" >>"$LOG" logger -t "$SCRIPTNAME" -- "Failed sending notification (apprise command not found)" exit 1 fi
TITLE=$(echo -e "$TITLE") MESSAGE=$(echo -e "$MESSAGE")
case "$IMPORTANCE" in normal) NOTIFY_TYPE="info" ;; warning) NOTIFY_TYPE="warning" ;; alert) NOTIFY_TYPE="failure" ;; *) NOTIFY_TYPE="info" ;; esac
CONFIG=$(mktemp /tmp/apprise-agent.XXXXXX) trap 'rm -f "$CONFIG"' EXIT printf '%s\n' "$APPRISE_URLS" > "$CONFIG"
if [[ -z "$(tr -d '[:space:];,' < "$CONFIG")" ]]; then echo "No Apprise URLs configured" >>"$LOG" logger -t "$SCRIPTNAME" -- "Failed sending notification (no Apprise URLs configured)" exit 1 fi
args=(-c "$CONFIG" -t "$TITLE" -b "$MESSAGE" -n "$NOTIFY_TYPE") if [[ -n "$TAGS" && "$TAGS" != "none" ]]; then tags="${TAGS//,/ }" for tag in $tags; do args+=(-g "$tag") done fi
output=$(apprise "${args[@]}" 2>&1) status=$? if [[ "$status" -ne 0 ]]; then echo "$output" >>"$LOG" logger -t "$SCRIPTNAME" -- "Failed sending notification ($output)" fi exit "$status"
